TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rahaw2, title = Rahaw2, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rahaw2} }

S.FORM: alang Rahaw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 17 buwan, 56 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 50 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%.

alang Rahaw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 17 buwan, 56 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 50 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%.
S.PHON: alaŋ raħaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%.
